options.name: -disable_lib_cells
options.description: To disable or enable MIS support for given library cell.

options.name: -mis_alignment_mode
options.description: This mode eliminates the inputs that are switching much earlier than the main input, which may cause large negative delays.

options.name: -switching_alignment_factor
options.description: Used to configure relative alignment of side inputs switching with respective to primary input to tune impact of MIS. It's value varies between -1 to 1.

options.name: -view
options.description: Specify view for the multi input switching alignment mode.
